title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.417 - Jerry Corp Memorial Highway designated for portion of U.S. Highway 160 in Ozark County
text:
227.417.  Jerry Corp Memorial Highway designated for portion of U.S. Highway 160 in Ozark County. — The portion of U.S. Highway 160 in Ozark County from the bridge that crosses Bryant Creek to a location two and one-half miles east of such bridge shall be known as the "Jerry Corp Memorial Highway".  The costs for such designation shall be paid by private donations.
(L. 2015 H.B. 522, et al. merged with S.B. 156)
